top_signals.title: Stocks Hold at Record Highs on US-Iran Deal Bets: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove stocks toward a historic streak of weekly gains, with the market also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Castlelake Considers Making Offer to Buy UK’s EasyJet
top_signals.summary: Castlelake LP is considering a possible offer for UK-based discount carrier EasyJet Plc, the private credit firm said in a statement.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
